data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for binding support for custom target entity/field scopes.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific need for binding support for custom target entity/field scopes. However, the provided evidence does not include any references to the implementation or testing of this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for such binding support, but there is no concrete evidence showing that this requirement has been satisfied or even attempted, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of binding support for custom target entity/field scopes.
